title: London Borough of Tower Hamlets: Letter to the Chief Executive (22 January 2025)
body: "A copy of the letter from Max Soule, Deputy Director, Local Government Stewardship and Interventions at the Ministry of Housing, Communities and Local Government to Stephen Halsey, the Chief Executive at the London Borough of Tower Hamlets, detailing the decision by the Secretary of State to intervene under section 15 of the Local Government Act 1999 and appoint a team of Ministerial Envoys to oversee the Council’s improvement work. "
